feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to make standard Fiori apps open an extended Fiori app instead of the standard one?
entry.content:
Hello experts, good morning.

I would like to ask for your guidance regarding an issue we are facing while extending a standard Fiori application.

Context:
We were asked to extend a standard app in order to adjust a specific parameter within it. To achieve this, we used a SAPUI5 Adaptation Project from SAP Business Application Studio (BAS).

The required adjustments were successfully implemented, and the app was deployed correctly to our system. After that, the necessary Catalog, Group, and Role were created so the extended app could be used.

Initially, a custom (Z) Target Mapping was created for the extended app, based on the standard app’s target mapping, and everything was working as expected.

However, we later identified the following issue:

The standard app can be launched from other standard Fiori applications. When this navigation occurs, the standard app is always opened, but our requirement is for the extended app to be opened instead, so the requested change can be used.

To address this, we tried modifying the Target Mapping, keeping the same semantic object (or at least the same name), and removing the original target mapping, so that the apps performing the navigation would open the extended app.

This approach worked partially. For some users, the navigation opens the extended app correctly. However, when testing with other users who have more roles and profiles assigned, the system still opens the standard app instead of the extended one.

Additionally, we tried using the “Add SAP Fiori Launchpad Config” option available in SAP BAS:

However, this option does not seem to work, may be deprecated, or not supported in our system, as we receive a “URL Not Found” error.

In summary, my main question is:

How can I make standard Fiori applications open the extended app instead of the standard one?

We have already tried adjusting the target mapping and exploring Launchpad configurations, but without complete success. At this point, we have run out of ideas and would really appreciate any guidance.

Do you know of any alternative approach, recommended solution, or documentation that could help in this scenario?

Thank you for your time and for reading my question.
I look forward to your comments.

Best regards,
EBZ

entry.title: Qeries related to Power BI integration with S/4hana
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We have a requirement to integrate our SAP S/4HANA DIGITS FPS01 Private Cloud systems with Microsoft Power BI to enable reporting and analytics using S/4HANA data.

In this context, we would like inputs on the following points:

  1. Feasibility & Best Practices

    • Is it feasible to integrate Power BI with SAP S/4HANA DIGITS?
    • Are there any SAP‑recommendations, or best practices for such an integration?

  2. Pros and Cons

    • Are there any known advantages and limitations (pros and cons) of integrating SAP S/4HANA with Power BI that we should be aware of?

  3. Licensing & Cost

    • Does [removed by moderator] require any additional SAP licensing to enable and use this integration with Power BI?
    • If yes, what are the licensing options and indicative costs involved?

Your guidance on the above will help us evaluate and plan the integration effectively.

Thank you for your support.


--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: None of these


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: No technical system for TMS system SID (DOMAIN_SID) in DEV System
entry.content:
I am getting an error when trying to implement SAP Note via SNOTE in S/4 HANA DEV system. The error says 

"No technical system for TMS system SID (DOMAIN_SID)"

The checks in STMS transaction of S/4 HANA DEV system and checks in LMDB transaction of SOLMAN system seems to be fine. Also, I have checked all the SAP Notes mentioned inside SAP Note  2486161 and these SAP Notes cannot be implemented in our SOLMAN system.

Has anyone encountered this error? If yes, could you please help here.

entry.title: Purchasing of Fixed Assets
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am trying to process fixed asset through procurement. My requirement is to have different cost centers in my FA master data and in transactional level, Purchase Order/ Purchase Requisition. I created a custom account assignment and made the cost center and fixed asset fields mandatory. I created fixed asset master data with Cost Center CC1000. Now, during creation of purchase order, I would want to charge the fixed asset to cost center CC2000. But when i try to enter and save the document, the cost center would automatically change to CC1000. 

Is changing cost center not standard/allowed in S4Hana Public? I want the cost centers to be different because:

1. Master data cost center - for depreciation
2. Purchase Order cost center - where cost/budget would come from 


Is there a workaround to cater having cost centers in master data and during transactions?

entry.title: Planned values not appearing for activity in CJ20N
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working on SAP Project System (PS) and facing an issue with planned values not appearing in CJ20N.

Scenario:

  • Network activity created in CJ20N
  • Work center is assigned to the activity
  • Activity type is maintained
  • Planned hours are entered for the activity
  • Activity is saved successfully

     


     

Issue:
Despite the above setup, planned values (costs/quantities) are not displayed against the activity in Edit->costs->plan/actual->Activity/element

 



Thanks and regards

entry.title: in S4HCloud - Query Browser app missing
entry.content:
in S4HCloud 2508 I don't find the Query Browser (not in any space, not in the app finder).

I included many roles already, as shown below, but still I don't have the App "Query Browser" in our development tenant. (Though I see the app now in the customizing tenant, where also the roles are assigned. All other roles are automatically valid for both tenants/clients - but not in the case of "QueryBrowser")

I added already many roles as described in a former post from 2018/2024, but it does not change anything.

*BR_ANALYTICS_SPECIALIST 
*BR_EMPLOYEE 
*BR_ADMINISTRATOR 
*BR_DEVELOPER 

Meanwhile I  added the by @dawid90  mentioned roles resp. the catalogs from the blog he mentioned, but it only helped to have the app in the customizing tenant, not in the development tenant.
I don't know if this split is unusual, I guess not.

Other colleagues with only role *BR_DEVELOPER  do have access/find it.

Any ideas? Thanks!

entry.title: issue with SAVE_TEXT Function Module PRLTEXTKZ is not set to 'X'
entry.content:
When using: 

  • BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS for result recording
  • RFC_SAVE_TEXT for saving the long text

the Inspection Results are created but the flag for Long Text Active (PRLTEXTKZ) is not set to X


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Reference field in Cloud for Credit Integration - Manage Credit Reports
entry.content:
Hello,

we are facing an issue with the Reference Field in the “Manage Credit Reports” app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for credit integration (Foundry) 

Normally, when we order a credit report, the Reference Field is automatically populated with the Business Partner ID. After the credit report is received, the Reference Field in the Manage Credit Reports app remains populated, and we can also see which user ordered the report.

However, when Business Partner Monitoring is active, the Reference Field is not populated when a credit report is updated. In addition, the Creator is shown as anonymous. Unfortunately, our business department relies on this information to quickly identify the relevant Business Partner when reviewing the Manage Credit Reports app.

After discussing this with our credit agency, we learned that they are not able to populate the Reference Field on their side.

Do you have any suggestions on how the Reference Field could be populated in this scenario?
Is there, for example, a way to enhance or inject custom logic so that the Reference Field in Cloud for Credit Integration is populated (e.g. based on the Company Name or Business Partner)?

Thank you !

entry.title: Attachement is attached in the Fiori My Inbox, and I want to view the attachemnt in SAP or Fiori
entry.content:
Attachment is attached in the Fiori My Inbox, and I want to view the attachment in SAP or Fiori, But I could not view the Attached Document, Please provide me the solution.


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

1. PR should created from Fiori
2. After Create a PR, Go to My Inbox for Approve.
3. In My Inbox select -> show Details in Right side        bottom -> and Select the Attachment.
4. Select the Attachment for the Upload and after Upload Approver will Approve the PR.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Transportation Management - Shipping Container and Equipment Details
entry.content:
Hello All,

I need to find the container count, individual container ids and equipment detail for a transportation management detail report. I do have sales order, delivery doc, transportation number, booking refference number and freight number along with material details. 

/SCMTMS/D_TORROT has the container count, but the field has zeros and not sure how to get the equipment details. 

Any ideas?

Thank you,

Arthur.

entry.title: BADI / Enhancement Spot For Adding Custom Email in Standard Workflow
entry.content:
We are trying to add the custom email functionality within the standard Workflow (WS50100021). This workflow already sends the notification to the user's my inbox, but the business needs an additional outlook mail before sending notification to my inbox. We are trying to achieve this without taking the copy of standard workflow and also tried implementing the below BADI's. But we are not able to achieve this. 
Kindly suggest if there are any BADI(s) to achieve it. 
Note: We are looking for BADI's during Work item Creation 

/IWWRK/BADI_WF_CUST_EXT_IB  
/IWWRK/ES_WF_MODIFY_ITEMS_IB 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP JOULE with S/4HANA ON-PREMISE systems
entry.content:
Hello experts 

We are working in a SAP S/4HANA implementation, and the version will be 2025, but it will in on-premise architecture. 

Ok, I checked and the customer needs a license to implement, in the SAP BTP. Additionally, there is a SAP NOTE https://me.sap.com/notes/3632703/E  that says the Joule is not possible install using a SAP on-premise solutions. 

My point is, why? 
If I have a Global Subscription in BTP, and with the SAP AI Core, including the SAP Integration Suite getting communication with my SAP S/4HANA on-premise, this SAP Note (3632703) is correct? 
Because I believe in the architecture and technical view, it's totally possible. Please could you help me to understand this point?

Thank you

entry.title: Derivation in COPA using BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST
entry.content:
Hi all,

should be possible to use the correspondant feature that we have in the manual journal entry of the profitability "Derivation" and recall it into the BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST or in a BAPI  to post journal entry in FI with profitability in COPA? and in case which are the step to do it?

Thanks, Davide

entry.title: QA11 stock posting issue
entry.content:
In QA11, stock posting is getting updated correctly when done manually through SAP standard process. However, when we try to post stock using standard function modules (such as MB_CREATE_GOODS_MOVEMENT, QAMB_COLLECT_RECORD, and MB_POST_GOODS_MOVEMENT), the stock quantities are not getting updated.
This indicates that the standard QA11 transaction performs additional internal validations and updates which are not triggered by directly calling these function modules.

Kindly suggest any BAPI for QA11 to change status and update the qty.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to display text beside value in organizational assignment transaction PA30 ?
entry.content:
Hallo expert, 

I have a case in transaction code PA30 on the organizational assignment tab in the enterprise structure section.
Some text values, such as the company code, are not appearing, and neither are others.
How can I get this text to appear?
Is this a configuration or enhancement program?

Thank you for your attention.
Best Regards

entry.title: Assignment of default Profit centers to GL accounts in S4 Hana
entry.content:
We have recently gone live on S4 Hana. Document splitting has been activated as well as profit center is mandatory.

We have also assigned default profit center to a few accounts like banks, equity, prepayments and payables where profit center cannot be derived.

In the case of VAT, AR postings are getting split into two profit centers - one for the sales portion and the second for the VAT portion. 

How can we avoid this so that VAT derives the same profit center as sales?

Default is necessary at the time of payment of VAT and that was the reason it was assigned using 3KEH.

Are we correct in using 3KEH?

Thanks for your inputs

entry.title: Are v3 (MCEX_UPDATE_*) jobs still required if all LIS datasources were converted to ODP?
entry.content:
I asked this from MS Copilot, and it said it is no longer required.  But looking at SAP Community posts, they say it is required.   Does anyone have an SAP note or documentation saying that v3 (MCEX_UPDATE_*) jobs are no longer required if all LIS datasources were converted to ODP?  BTW, this is for an up-to-date S/4HANA on-premise system and BW 7.5 HANA on-premise system.

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Make Custom Field read-only that is added using Custom Fields and Logic Fiori app (F1481)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We added a Custom Field in Fiori app Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document (F0843A) using Custom Field and Logic Fiori app (F1481) with Business Context Accounting: Coding Block (FINS_CODING_BLOCK) and enabled it for OData service's (MMIM_GR4PO_DL_SRV ) Item entity, GR4PO_DL_Item. Now, we want to set this field to Read-only but we are not able to find correct way to set it.

We noticed that when we created this custom field, another custom field was also created in the background of type CFD_CUSTOM_UI_FIELD_CONTROL for structure MMIM_GR4PO_DL_ITEM, which seems like a field for field properties control, but we are not sure how to use this or change the behaviour using this field. This additional field is not available/visible when we are writing logic in Custom Logic app (F6957), only the created custom field is shown.

Does anyone also faced this issue and can suggest how to proceed?

Best regards

Ankur

entry.title: Authorization activities before and after SAP S/4HANA On-Premise upgrade (SAP GUI only)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am working on an SAP S/4HANA On-Premise upgrade project (SAP S/4HANA 2021 to SAP S/4HANA 2023) and I am responsible for Authorization. I would like to ask for best practices and recommendations regarding authorization activities before and after the upgrade.

  • Before the S/4HANA upgrade, what authorization-related checks or preparation activities should be done?
  • After the S/4HANA upgrade, which authorization follow-on activities are mandatory?

Please help to advise

Thanks,
QuocDT5

entry.title: 12 characters limit on UserID in SU01
entry.content:
We are not able increase the 12 character limit on UserID created in SU01. it is not accepting UserID longer than 12 characters.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
